overview.description: Global leader in IP intercoms and access control hardware, with AI-powered face recognition and biometric access
overview.description_long: 2N TELEKOMUNIKACE is a Prague-based manufacturer of IP intercom systems, access control readers, electronic locks, elevator communication systems, and indoor stations. Founded in 1991, the company invented the world's first IP intercom in 2008 and the first LTE intercom. Their products integrate AI-powered features such as Adaptive Face Zooming and facial recognition for access control. Acquired by Axis Communications (a Canon subsidiary) in 2016, 2N operates globally with all R&D and manufacturing based in Prague.
overview.tagline: Setting the future standard of access. Since 1991.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 1991 by three friends with a passion for technology and invention. Incorporated as an a.s. in 2000. Invented the world's first IP intercom in 2008 and the first LTE intercom. Acquired by Axis Communications (part of Canon group) in 2016.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by three friends
Invented the world's first IP intercom (2N Helios IP Vario)
Acquired by and became part of the Axis Group (Canon subsidiary)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: 2N is primarily a hardware manufacturer — IP intercoms, access control readers, and electronic locks. Their value proposition is deeply embedded in physical product design, EU manufacturing, cybersecurity certification, and global distribution. AI (face recognition, Adaptive Face Zooming) is one feature of their hardware, not their core business. Foundation models cannot easily replicate hardware products with 5-year warranties and 8-year firmware support.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: 2N is the self-described global leader in IP intercoms with products sold in 100+ countries. The access control and building security market is large, established, and growing with smart building trends. They have a 30+ year track record and are backed by Axis Communications (Canon group), providing financial stability.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: 2N is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Axis Communications AB (part of Canon group), making it fully backed by a large publicly-traded parent. No independent funding risk applies.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Deep hardware moat in an established market, 30+ years of history, global leadership in IP intercoms, strong parent company backing (Canon/Axis), and all R&D and manufacturing based in Prague. AGI has minimal impact on a hardware product company with physical installation requirements, regulatory certifications, and long product lifecycles.

metadata.notes: 2N was founded in 1991 but incorporated as a.s. in 2000. The company states '200+ people in R&D' and '70+ in Sales', with additional Operations, Manufacturing, Customer Care teams; total estimated at 501-1000. 3 active job postings as of March 2026 per Czech business register. Glassdoor blocked automated access; no rating data available. AI features include Adaptive Face Zooming and facial recognition in access control products.
